subject: A pale-skinned humanoid warrior leaps between cliff faces at sunset, trailing glowing energy lines and holding a grapple-hook weapon in each hand
description: A humanoid figure with pale skin and long loose hair is caught mid-leap between two rock formations against a dramatic twilight or sunset sky. The figure is airborne, arms outstretched, holding glowing hook-and-line weapons that trail golden energy. Their clothing is a mix of dark fitted garments and leather straps — consistent with Kor climbing gear. The setting is rocky desert cliffs at dusk. The composition has strong dynamic energy with the figure cutting diagonally across the frame. Face is visible but fine features are not fully resolvable at this resolution.
foreground: airborne pale-skinned humanoid with glowing hook weapons, arms spread
background: desert cliff faces, sunset sky in purple-orange
